bot13.name: BOT13
bot13.tagline: Daily intraday bot. Buys at open, sells before close. Skips the session if no edge.

oracle.name: ORACLE
oracle.tagline: Weekly bot. Trades every Monday. All-in on the week's best bets.

current_strategy.rationale: Top 5 coins by composite momentum. Score-weighted (not equal weight). Sector cap enforced (max 2 per category). Quality gate: 20d momentum positive required.

wizard.name: WIZARD
wizard.tagline: Monthly hold bot. Buys the 1st of month, sells the last. Slow and patient.

current_strategy.rationale: Top 8 quality coins for the month. Quartile-weighted (top coins get largest allocation). 60d quality filter applied — no negative long-term trends. Sector cap enforced. Stop flag at -12% intra-month.

equalizer.name: EQUALIZER
equalizer.tagline: Equal weight. No favorites. $1,000 in every coin.

titan.name: TITAN
titan.tagline: Half on the heavyweights. Half on the rest. Concentration meets coverage.
